name: The Sunrise Shack - Kailua
tagline: Instagram-famous but actually good — bulletproof coffee, acai bowls, and smoothies in a bright yellow Kailua shack.
parking: Street parking on Kailua Rd; small lot nearby
bestTime: Morning before or after Kailua/Lanikai beach. Weekday mornings are chill
talkStory: Sunrise Shack started as a literal shack at Pipeline on the North Shore, serving bulletproof coffee and smoothie bowls to surfers. The Kailua location brings the same health-focused menu to the Windward side: cold brew with coconut oil, turmeric lattes, loaded acai bowls, and avocado toast. Yes, it's Instagram-famous and the aesthetic is curated, but the quality backs it up — they use local ingredients and the coffee is legit. The bright yellow storefront is a Kailua landmark at this point.
